cycle_4922_directive.priority_rationale: Cycle #4922 was a TWO-LANDING cycle (Bolt + Sage), with Trace correctly idle waiting on the audit-finding queue Bolt is clearing. Sage's #568 audit + buildNewArrivalHtml conversion in the SAME cycle definitively breaks the C4915 6th-slip escalation clause — for the first time in the brand-pass program Sage delivered both the inventory survey AND a conversion in one commit, which is exactly the cadence the program needs to close out 11 remaining PARTIAL templates. Bolt's #569 W-12 P2 fix preserves fullyParallel:true workers=2 root setting (zero parallel-speedup regression) — option (b) per-spec reservation paid the higher dividend than option (a) describe.serial. Trace's W-12 closing leaves W-9 cluster (5 rows) as the last open Phase 8 audit-debt; #570 is queued for Bolt P0 next cycle. Streaks: 27-cycle green-gate (C4889-C4922), 51-commit lint-zero. Bectly gates: #14 GMC at DEFCON-0 with 5 days to Apr 30 Doppl VTO — final-warning posture, no movement bectly side this cycle.
cycle_4922_directive.cycle_net_effect: Two clean landings, no escalations triggered, Phase 8 audit-debt down to 1 task (#570), brand-pass program reactivated with audit-grounded queue (11 PARTIAL templates → 1-2/cycle target = 5-7 cycle close).
